Gender Equality.reason: The course reading list explicitly includes '近代台灣女性史' (History of Modern Taiwanese Women), indicating a focus on historical gender roles and struggles, relevant to Target 5.1.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course mentions studying the '政經文化背景' (political and economic background), which might tangentially touch upon historical labor and economic conditions.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course analyzes the Japanese colonial period and '台灣抗日運動史' (anti-Japanese movement), directly addressing historical political and social inequalities, aligning with Targets 10.2 and 10.3.
